ErrorResponseDto.description: Standard JSON error payload returned by service error middleware.

WorkspaceResponseDto.description:
DTO for workspace API responses.
Shapes the workspace data returned to the client.

kind.description: Workspace kind, used to distinguish personal home workspaces.

role.description: Caller's role within this workspace (if applicable).

shared_with.description: Other active member emails this workspace is shared with (excluding caller).

CreateWorkspaceDto.description:
DTO for creating a new workspace.
Validated at the controller boundary.

slug.description: Optional URL-friendly slug. Auto-generated if omitted.

kind.description: Workspace kind: shared by default, personal for private home workspaces.

PaginatedResponse_WorkspaceResponseDto_.description: Paginated response envelope returned by list endpoints.

UpdateWorkspaceDto.description:
DTO for renaming an existing workspace.
All fields are optional so partial updates remain possible.

InviteWorkspaceMemberResponseDto.description: DTO returned after inviting a workspace member.

workspace_id.description: Workspace where the membership was created or reactivated.

user_id.description: User id of the invited member.

email.description: Email used for the invitation lookup.

role.description: Role assigned to the invited member.

InviteWorkspaceMemberDto.description:
DTO for inviting a workspace member by email.
Validated at the controller boundary.

email.description: Email address of the target user to invite.

HealthResponseDto.description: Health response returned by service liveness endpoints.

FolderResponseDto.description:
DTO for folder API responses.
Shapes the folder data returned to the client.

CreateFolderDto.description:
DTO for creating a new folder.
Validated at the controller boundary before passing to the service layer.

parent_folder_id.description: Parent folder ID for nesting (null = workspace root).

sort_order.description: Optional manual sort ordering within the parent.

PaginatedResponse_FolderResponseDto_.description: Paginated response envelope returned by list endpoints.

UpdateFolderDto.description:
DTO for updating an existing folder.
All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated.

parent_folder_id.description: Move folder to a new parent (null = move to workspace root).

Record_string.unknown_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

DocumentResponseDto.description:
DTO for document API responses.
Shapes the document data returned to the client.

folder_id.description: Folder this document is in (null = workspace root).

content_json.description: Latest version content (ProseMirror JSON), if loaded.

content_text.description: Latest version plain text, if loaded.

CreateDocumentDto.description:
DTO for creating a new document.
Validated at the controller boundary before passing to the service layer.

folder_id.description: Optional folder placement within the workspace.

PaginatedResponse_DocumentResponseDto_.description: Paginated response envelope returned by list endpoints.

UpdateDocumentDto.description:
DTO for updating an existing document.
All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated.

workspace_id.description: Updated workspace UUID when moving the document.

folder_id.description: Updated folder UUID when moving the document.

content_text.description: Updated plain text extraction of the document content.

InviteDocumentMemberResponseDto.description:
DTO returned after inviting a user to a single document.
Distinguishes direct document shares from workspace membership invites.

role.description: Direct document role granted to the invited user.

info.title: Caret Document Service API
info.description: REST API for Caret documents, folders, and workspaces.

post.description: Create a workspace and add the caller as owner.

get.description: List workspaces visible to the caller.

post.description: Invite a collaborator to a workspace by email.

get.description: Return liveness status for the Document Service.

post.description: Create a folder in a workspace.

get.description: List folders in a workspace, optionally scoped by parent folder.
List all folders in a workspace as a flat tree-building payload.

patch.description: Update folder name, parent, or sort order.

delete.description: Soft-delete a folder and nested content.

post.description: Create a document in a workspace.

get.description: List documents shared directly with the caller.

post.description: Invite a collaborator to a document by email.
